metadata.description: Official Hypo-Workflow marketplace for Claude Code installation.

plugins.name: hypo-workflow
plugins.description: Serialized prompt workflow with OpenCode native adapter scaffold, V10 Analysis Preset, Knowledge Ledger, Explore Mode, global setup CLI/TUI, acceptance loops, explicit sync, and 36 user-facing skills covering setup, planning, execution, cycles, patches, compact, guide, showcase, rules, debugging, auditing, release, watchdog, and dashboard.
